Reading: State
Poor
Recovery 46 • Sleep 72 • Strain —

Read
Your system woke under-recovered despite a normal-length night, so capacity is narrowed before the day begins. For muscle retention, this is a day that favors steadier effort and a measured deficit over intensity or restriction.

Measured, not maximal.
